case_title: STEPHEN ROSENBLUETH VS. JENNIFER HAYASHI et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-27-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HAYASHI, JENNIFER
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,150.00 FILED BY ROSENBLUETH, STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT HAYASHI, JENNIFER ACOSTA, KRISTINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-19-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED (UNCLAIMED) COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ACOSTA, KRISTINA
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT ACOSTA, KRISTINA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-01-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROSENBLUETH, STEPHEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HAYASHI, JENNIFER ACOSTA, KRISTINA ABSENT A WRITTEN AGREEMENT TO THE CONTRARY, PLAINTIFF'S AGREEMENT WITH THE REPLACEMENT TENANTS RELEASED DEFENDANTS FROM THEIR OBLIGATION TO HIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROSENBLUETH, STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT ACOSTA, KRISTINA
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROSENBLUETH, STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT HAYASHI, JENNIFER
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL IS GRANTED. -COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-01-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-01-2011 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2010 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO NOV-01-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
